facebook.caption:
476 reviews. 4.1 stars. And most tourists in Phu Quoc have never heard of Suối Đá Bàn.

This eco-tourism zone is all natural rock pools, jungle streams, and actual shade. Not a beach bar in sight. Just water, boulders, and locals actually swimming.

If you need a break from the resort strip, this is where to go.

Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Watch the water move through these rock pools at Suối Đá Bàn. 476 people rated this spot. Barely anyone on the tourist trail knows it exists.

instagram.caption:
476 reviews and tourists keep walking past Suối Đá Bàn.

Rock pools. Jungle streams. Zero beach clubs.

Tag your travel buddy.
instagram.video_caption: Rock pools, cold water, real jungle. Suối Đá Bàn hits different when you skip the beach for a day.

tiktok.caption: 476 reviews and still off the tourist radar. Suối Đá Bàn, Phu Quoc. #PhuQuoc #VietnamTravel #TravelTips #PhuQuocNature
